name: decky-nonsteam-badges
description: Decky plugin to identify non-Steam games and display a badge on their library capsules

scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; let ok=/pnpm\/9\./.test(ua); if(!ok){try{const v=require('child_process').execSync('pnpm -v',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim(); ok=/^9\./.test(v);}catch{ok=false}} if(!ok){console.error('Please use pnpm v9 (corepack prepare pnpm@9.0.0 --activate) to keep lockfileVersion 9.0'); process.exit(1);} "
scripts.test: pnpm run test:build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p '*.py'
scripts.test:build: tsc --noEmit false --outDir .test-dist --rootDir src --module ESNext --target ES2020 --moduleResolution bundler --types node --skipLibCheck src/utils/store.ts src/utils/settings.ts src/utils/logger.ts src/utils/badgePlacement.ts src/utils/observerRoute.ts src/utils/storeCache.ts src/types/store.ts src/types/settings.ts
scripts.deps:install: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.0.0 --activate && pnpm install

author: sebet
